task_description: Upgrade DataPrism Streamlit app with new features: enhanced data ingestion (multi-format, paste mode, sample datasets), data profiling (quality score, column profiles, AI commentary, correlation heatmap), expanded data cleaning (AI assistant, text operations, cap outliers, flag missing), advanced analytics (statistical tests, regression, clustering, forecasting, EDA), AI intelligence layer (insight cards, explain number, executive summary), dashboards (KPI cards, full chart library, auto-build, global filters), PDF/DOCX report export with branding, guided mode enhancements (glossary, guardrails, sensitivity), workspace features (projects, audit log, versioning, onboarding), and UX polish (empty states, keep-alive).
